proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P2
; LINE: 90
; PROVEN: referencedVars < 2 implies contribution = 0.
; The if-guard `if (referencedVars >= 2)` is the exclusive entry to transitionCount++.
; When the guard evaluates false, the body cannot fire.
(declare-const refs_vars Int)
(declare-const contribution Int)
; Code: refs_vars is a non-negative count of distinct declared names in one assertion
(assert (>= refs_vars 0))
; Code transition: contribution is binary (if-body fires or not)
(assert (>= contribution 0))
(assert (<= contribution 1))
; Code transition: the if-guard is the sole condition for incrementing
(assert (=> (< refs_vars 2) (= contribution 0)))
; Premise: assertion references fewer than 2 declared vars
(assert (< refs_vars 2))
; Negation: contribution > 0 despite guard being false
(assert (> contribution 0))
(check-sat)
; expect: unsat — (refs_vars < 2) + the implication + (contribution > 0) is contradictory
